always: Use OpenKit kit tools and OpenCode built-in tools (Read, Edit, Write, Glob, Grep) instead of OS-level commands (grep, cat, find, sed, awk) when operating on source code files. Bash calls for blocked commands will be rejected by the tool enforcement plugin.

quick: STRICT enforcement: All OS-level search/read/transform commands on code files are blocked. Use built-in tools exclusively.
full: STRICT enforcement: All OS-level search/read/transform commands on code files are blocked. Use built-in tools exclusively.
migration: MODERATE enforcement: OS-level commands generate warnings but are not blocked. Prefer built-in tools when possible.
